# AGENTS.md — _kportfolio

Read first, in order:
1. Master co-work contract: `C:\Users\asase\Desktop\claude\AGENTS.md` (separate repo one level up — your tool will NOT auto-load it, read it explicitly).

## Hard rules (any vendor, no exceptions)

- Deployment, spending money, security changes, data deletion -> explicit owner approval BEFORE acting.
- Never commit secrets: `.env*` (except `.env.example`), `wallet.json`, `*.key`, `*.pem`, `id_rsa*`, mnemonics, session cookies, `*.exe`. A git pre-commit scan blocks these — never bypass it (`--no-verify` forbidden).
- Never `git add .` / `git add -A` — stage specific files only.
- Never force-push main/master. Private repos only.
- Commits: Conventional format `type(scope): summary` (imperative, first line <= 50 chars).
- Conversation with the owner: Korean. Code, docs, commit messages: English.

## Concurrency (multi-agent co-work)

- ONE project = ONE active agent session at a time, regardless of vendor.
- Parallel work on this project -> separate git worktree + branch: `git worktree add ../_kportfolio-<topic> -b agent/<vendor>/<topic>`.
- The Claude master session's Stop hook auto-commits + pushes doc files (CLAUDE.md / PROGRESS.md / DEFERRED.md / CHANGELOG.md / AGENTS.md) in this repo — only on main/master, pathspec-scoped, so your staged files and branches are untouched. Anything you commit to main will be auto-pushed shortly after.
- Code commits happen only on explicit owner request — docs are the only auto-committed files.
